title: populus simonii var. przewalskii
intro: Populus simonii var. przewalskii, also known as Przewalskii Poplar, is a deciduous tree species native to China, belonging to the Populus genus. Its bark and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Populus simonii var. przewalskii are typically dried and processed into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
